inputs.label: Pre-Training Assessment Score
inputs.businessContext: Average score of trainees before training, as percentage of maximum.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average score of trainees before training, as percentage of maximum.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'heures de formation dispensées.
